# Type of person
<!--- THIS FILE IS GENERATED PLEASE DO NOT EDIT IT DIRECTLY --->

Allows you to categorize people according to their relationship with the company, for example collaborator (internal employee) or guest (external, visitor)

<OH code="personType"/>




## Required Properties {#properties-mandatory}
    
### Code {#code}

The person type code used for import and integrations

*Technical name:* ```code```
<PH code="personType:code"/>

### Last name {#name}

The name of the person type, for example &quot;Collaborator&quot; or &quot;Guest&quot;

*Technical name:* ```name```
<PH code="personType:name"/>

    





## Associated entities (list) {#properties-has-many}
